{{Quote|If I'm not back when you've finished your scrimpi, come looking.|Mara Jade Skywalker to Anakin Solo|<ref name="Balance Point" />}}
'''Scrimpi''' was a spicy meat dish, common in [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]] and edible by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. The dish consisted of herbivore meat, [[Soypro]], [[water]], and exotic spices, and was covered in [[glockaw sauce]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Solo]] ordered scrimpi at the [[Leafy Green]] [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcafe]] while investigating a suspected [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Unidentified Yuuzhan Vong (Leafy Green)|infiltrator]] with his aunt [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="Balance Point" />

{{Food-stub}}
